name: HUMAN Security
description: Cybersecurity and ad fraud defense platform protecting digital advertising across 20T weekly interactions on web, app and CTV.

seo.title: HUMAN Security — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: HUMAN Security: Cybersecurity and ad fraud defense platform protecting digital advertising across 20T weekly interactions on web, app and CTV.

when_to_use: Bot and invalid traffic defense across 20T weekly digital ad interactions
Ad fraud prevention for mobile, web, and CTV programmatic supply chains
Protecting app and web traffic quality for ad-funded publisher inventory
Cybersecurity layer against SIVT and sophisticated bot attacks for platforms

pros: Massive traffic vantage powers bot detection accuracy
Covers web, app and CTV in one platform
Strong fit for ad platforms and large advertisers
cons: Not a mobile MMP — attribution still separate
Deep integration required to unlock full value
Can feel heavy for mid-market buyers
review.verdict: Industry-grade bot and fraud defense for ad ecosystems, but pairs with, not replaces, an MMP.
review.best_for: Large ad platforms, networks and brand advertisers defending against sophisticated bots.
review.not_for: Solo app developers or SMBs who just need install attribution.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
